colors.palette_description: Warm sand, sage green, and charcoal. Grounded, matte, physical.

layouts.dashboard_grid: High Density Grid (Mode B). grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4 with gap-4 or gap-6. Stretch children with h-full.
layouts.spacing: Generous Spacing Philosophy. Use p-6, p-8, p-12. Containers with borders MUST have internal padding p-6 or p-8.
layouts.surfaces: Flat Solid surfaces. Subtle roundness (max 8px border-radius). Use 1px subtle border. No heavy shadows, use flat rectangular or dense styles.
layouts.header: Solid background with a hard bottom border or Crystal Glass if content scrolls under it. Must be z-50. Never fully transparent.
layouts.alignment: Mobile-first responsive. Optical alignment. Left-align dense content, lists, forms.

components.forms: Use Shadcn Input, Select, Form, Checkbox (heavily customized for brand). NEVER use native inputs.
components.date_picker: Shadcn calendar for date pickers (NOT HTML input type='date').
components.charts: Shadcn chart components or recharts. Must use color-blind-friendly palettes.
components.buttons: Pill-shaped or max 8px border-radius. MUST have hover states (lighter hue of active state color). Focus states must have HIGHER contrast.
components.cards: Flat background, 1px subtle border (border-border), no shadow by default. Hover: slight lift (-translate-y-1), shadow-sm, border darkens.

visual_enhancers.textures: Subtle grain textures, noise overlays to kill digital flatness.
visual_enhancers.motion: Use framer-motion for micro-interactions. Hover states, press states, focus states, staggered entrance for lists. NEVER use `transition: all`.
visual_enhancers.icons: Use @phosphor-icons/react for Duotone weight, high-end feel. Yarn add @phosphor-icons/react. Do not use AI emojis.

dashboard_hero_owner_dog.description: African American male sitting on pavement with Akita Inu. Use for welcome section or profile empty state.

care_guide_cat.description: Tabby cat snuggled in a blanket. Use for 'Tips on sleep/comfort' or care advice.

vet_visit_checkup.description: Veterinarian performing a check-up on a dog. Use for Vet visits log empty state or header.

media.rules: Images must not exceed 80vh on mobile. Use max-h-[80vh] md:max-h-none. Use text shadow when placing text over images.

accessibility.contrast: Minimum 4.5:1 for normal text. Use APCA. Tinted neutral greys (never pure black/gray).
accessibility.focus: Animations must not interfere with keyboard navigation. Focus indicators must be prominent.

testing.data_testid: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a `data-testid` attribute (kebab-case, role-based). e.g., `data-testid="add-vet-visit-button"`.

instructions_to_main_agent: Italian language must be used for all text/copy (e.g., 'Profilo Animale', 'Prossime Scadenze', 'Libreria Guide').
Implement the ORGANIC & EARTHY archetype palette (Sage Green, Warm Sand, Charcoal).
Use Manrope for headings and Outfit for body text.
Prioritize flat, cardless or 8px rounded corners for a clean, trustworthy medical/health dashboard feel.
Create high-density 'Bento' grids for the dashboard to track upcoming vaccines and antiparasitic treatments.
Implement Vet Visit Logs, Vaccine Trackers, and AI chat using customized Shadcn components.
Never use generic centered layouts or simplistic gradients.
Use sonner for notifications (e.g., upcoming due dates).
Implement specific `data-testid` attributes on all buttons, forms, and actionable items.
Do not add `.App { text-align: center; }` to the CSS file. Remove default App.css spin animation.
UNIVERSAL_GUIDELINES_FOR_MAIN_AGENT: Dark colors look good when used independently without gradients. DO NOT use dark colors as gradients.
Don't make generic centered layouts, simplistic gradients, and uniform styling.
Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy.
Use glass-morphism effects with backdrop filters (12-24px blur) where appropriate.
You MUST NOT apply universal transition. Eg: `transition: all`. This results in breaking transforms. Always add transitions for specific interactive elements like button, input excluding transforms.
You MUST NOT center align the app container, ie do not add `.App { text-align: center; }` in the css file. This disrupts the human natural reading flow of text.
Always use modern button styles like pill-shaped, or sharp button with interaction animations & color relevant to the app style.
NEVER: use AI assistant Emoji characters like 🤖🧠💭💡🔮🎯 etc for icons.
Every interaction needs micro-animations - hover states, transitions, parallax effects, and entrance animations. Static = dead.
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable. Cramped designs look cheap.
Subtle grain textures, noise overlays, custom cursors, selection states, and loading animations: separates good from extraordinary.
Main agent relies on these image URLs. Missing categories (especially sponsor logos) = main agent will use placeholder text which is FORBIDDEN.
Prioritize using pre-existing components from src/components/ui when applicable.
Create new components that match the style and conventions of existing components when needed.
